abilities.name: Protected (Undead)
abilities.text: After an enemy model targets this model, this model may discard a card. If it does so, a friendly undead model within 2" suffers any effects generated by that action.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.text: This model can move through other models.

actions.name: Fresh Meat
actions.costs_and_restrictions: A friendly undead model in LoS of the target may move up to 5" toward the target.

triggers.name: Clawed to Pieces
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target is within 1" of a Mindless Zombie, this action deals +1 damage to it.

triggers.name: Resurrect
triggers.text: Enemy only. Summon a Mindless Zombie in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Return of the Living Dead
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action has a raise value of 3.
actions.effects: Summon one Mindless Zombie within range. For each raise this action receives, summon an additional Mindless Zombie within range.

actions.name: Healing Energy
actions.effects: Target heals 2. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +2.

triggers.name: Necromatic Rituals
triggers.text: Kill a friendly Mindless Zombie within 2" of the target. When resolving, the target heals +2.

actions.name: Intuition
actions.effects: Look at the top three cards of your fate deck and then return them in any order.
